answers.description: Enterprise telecom monitoring API with real-time dashboards, automated reporting, and customer care operations
answers.problem: The existing Express.js API has architectural debt, tight coupling, and scalability issues that need modernization
answers.users: Both NOC engineers and management stakeholders viewing dashboards and reports
answers.goals: 1) Full functional parity with v3  2) Improved architecture and maintainability  3) Better scalability with clustering and event-driven design
answers.database: MariaDB/MySQL (TypeORM for iMonitorV3_1) + Raw SQL for iMonitorData & EtlV3_2 + Redis + Presto
